service_description: Top-level service monitoring the health of all SOC functions including threat detection, incident response, vulnerability management, and identity security.

child_services.title: SIEM Platform Health
child_services.description: Monitors the health and performance of the Splunk SIEM platform

kpis.title: Indexing Rate (EPS)
kpis.base_search: index=_internal source=*metrics.log group=per_index_thruput | stats sum(kb) as total_kb | eval eps=total_kb*1024/1000

kpis.title: Search Concurrency
kpis.base_search: index=_internal source=*metrics.log group=search_concurrency | stats max(active_hist_searches) as active_searches

kpis.title: License Usage Percentage
kpis.base_search: index=_internal source=*license_usage.log type=Usage | stats sum(b) as bytes | eval pct_used=round(bytes/license_quota*100,2)

kpis.title: Forwarder Connectivity
kpis.base_search: index=_internal source=*metrics.log group=tcpin_connections | stats dc(hostname) as connected_forwarders

child_services.title: Threat Detection
child_services.description: Monitors detection capabilities including correlation searches, notable events, and MITRE ATT&CK coverage

kpis.title: Mean Time to Detect (MTTD)
kpis.base_search: index=notable | eval mttd=(_time - trigger_time)/60 | stats avg(mttd) as avg_mttd

kpis.title: False Positive Rate
kpis.base_search: index=notable | stats count(eval(status="closed_false_positive")) as fp, count as total | eval fp_rate=round(fp/total*100,2)

child_services.title: Incident Response
child_services.description: Tracks incident response metrics and SLA compliance

kpis.title: Mean Time to Respond (MTTR)
kpis.base_search: index=notable status=closed | eval mttr=(resolved_time - _time)/60 | stats avg(mttr) as avg_mttr

kpis.title: SLA Compliance
kpis.base_search: index=notable | eval within_sla=if(response_time<=sla_target,1,0) | stats avg(within_sla) as sla_pct | eval sla_pct=round(sla_pct*100,2)
